name: Track Library
description: Producer track catalog with searchable table of finished and in-progress tracks plus a per-track detail view with waveform preview and version history.

page_briefs.tracks: Searchable browse surface for the producer's track catalog. Top area holds a filter bar with genre, status, BPM, and key facets plus a search field. Below, a dense data table lists tracks with title, duration, BPM, last-edited, collaborators, and status columns.
page_briefs.track-detail: Detail view for a single track. Hero area plays the rendered waveform with transport controls and region markers. A version history panel lists each saved revision with timestamps, authors, and notes so producers can compare and restore prior takes.

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with primary content column
